rulings.Case Title: DESIREE BARNES et al VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 1, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT AMERICAN TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant without leave to amend. No showing of knowledge or ratification by corporate entity. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC VS. CHINESE GOURMET GROUP INC.,
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 1, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER. Deny - Future rent uncertain/no competent evidence re reasonable efforts to mitigate. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC VS. CHINESE GOURMET GROUP INC.,
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 1, 2013, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Sustian with leave to amend to allege how cross-complainant can rely on provisions missing from lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HWA 555 OWNERS LLC, A DELAWRE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. THE ALIOTO LAW FIRM, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Joseph M. Alioto As A Judgment Debtor
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 1, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF HWA 555 OWNERS LLC, A DELAWRE LIMITED LIABILITY's Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Joseph M. Alioto As A Judgment Debtor. Grant, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 1, 2013, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANTs, NOEL SBERLO and NADINE SBERLO, TRUSTEES FOR THE SBERLO FAMILY's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT. Grant - all causes of action arise out of protected activity, no competent evidence re prevailing on the merits. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MINNIE DEJESUS VS. CLAUDIO N. BORSATO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 1, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT PETE NAJI's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Grant. Opposition provides no proof of service and fails to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. = (501/REQ)
